message:
ci: fix e2e test isolation and comment handling (#516)

* ci: prevent regular comments from cancelling e2e tests

Only /ok-to-test and /retest comments should trigger and potentially
cancel in-progress e2e test runs. Regular comments now get a unique
concurrency group so they don't interfere with running tests.

Changes:
- Add conditional concurrency grouping based on comment content
- Add /retest as a valid trigger command in gate job
- Remove re-run-action.yaml (doesn't update CI status properly)
- Update status context to be generic for comment triggers

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: isolate cluster-scoped resource cleanup between parallel PRs

The cleanup step was deleting ClusterRoles and ClusterRoleBindings using
only `app.kubernetes.io/name=workload-variant-autoscaler`, which matches
ALL releases. When one PR's e2e test completed, it deleted RBAC from
other concurrently running PR tests, causing 403 errors when querying
Prometheus.

Fix: Add `app.kubernetes.io/instance=$WVA_RELEASE_NAME` to the label
selector so cleanup only removes resources from the current release.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: use descriptive concurrency group prefix

Address Copilot review: rename 'noop-{0}' to 'comment-skip-{0}' for
clarity about the group's purpose (preventing regular comments from
cancelling test runs).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: address Copilot review feedback

- Rename concurrency group to 'comment-isolated-{run_id}' for clarity
- Add NOTE about keeping valid command list in sync between concurrency
  logic and gate job validation

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: add bidirectional sync notes for valid commands

Both the concurrency logic and gate job validation now reference each
other, making it clear that changes to valid commands must be updated
in both places.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: correct line reference in sync note

Update line reference from 'lines 24-25' to 'lines 23-25' to accurately
point to the concurrency group logic that checks for valid commands.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* ci: cleanup resources on cancellation

Change cleanup condition from success() to !failure() so resources are
cleaned up on both success and cancellation, but preserved on failure
for debugging.

- Success → cleanup (free resources)
- Failure → no cleanup (preserve for debugging, GPUs already scaled down)
- Cancelled → cleanup (nothing to debug, prevents orphaned resources)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: use explicit cleanup condition

Use (success() || cancelled()) instead of !failure() to be more explicit
and exclude skipped runs from triggering cleanup.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: make HPA behavior configurable via helm values

Make HPA stabilization windows and scaling policies configurable through
values.yaml instead of requiring post-install patching.

Changes:
- Add hpa.behavior section to values.yaml with scaleUp/scaleDown config
- Update hpa.yaml template to use configurable values
- Add HPA_STABILIZATION_SECONDS env var to install.sh
- Pass HPA behavior settings in helm install commands
- Remove "Patch HPAs for faster e2e testing" step from CI workflow

This eliminates the need for runtime patching of HPAs in e2e tests.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: remove unnecessary quotes from if condition

GitHub Actions expressions don't require outer quotes.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* ci: trigger e2e re-run

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,16 +0,0 @@
-name: Re-Run PR tests
-
-on:
-  issue_comment:
-    types: [created]
-
-jobs:
-  rerun_pr_tests:
-    name: rerun_pr_tests
-    if: ${{ github.event.issue.pull_request }}
-    runs-on: ubuntu-20.04
-    steps:
-    - uses: estroz/rerun-actions@main
-      with:
-        repo_token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
-        comment_id: ${{ github.event.comment.id }}

@@ -91,6 +91,22 @@ hpa:
   enabled: true
   maxReplicas: 10
   targetAverageValue: "1"
+  # HPA scaling behavior configuration
+  behavior:
+    scaleUp:
+      stabilizationWindowSeconds: 240
+      selectPolicy: Max
+      policies:
+        - type: Pods
+          value: 10
+          periodSeconds: 150
+    scaleDown:
+      stabilizationWindowSeconds: 240
+      selectPolicy: Max
+      policies:
+        - type: Pods
+          value: 10
+          periodSeconds: 150
 
 vllmService:
   enabled: true
